features.featureTitle: Update the right column of the AboutSection component to display two images side-by-side: a historic 1902 photo of McKinley Elementary School in Spokane, WA on the left, and a current gymnasium photo of McKinley Elementary School in Spokane, WA on the right. Each image should be clearly labeled (e.g., '1902' and 'Today' or 'Historic' and 'Current Gymnasium'). The layout must remain visually balanced within the two-column About section.
